name: copy machine
description: A beige office copy machine, circa 1987. Its power light blinks green. A sheet of paper sits in the output tray.

name: sheet of paper
description: A single sheet of white paper, still warm from the copy machine. It reads: 'MEMORANDUM: All staff must dispose of documents properly. Failure to comply will result in disciplinary action.'

name: trash can
description: A dented metal trash can with 'THERAPY GARDEN' stenciled on the side. It's mostly empty except for some wilted herb trimmings.
